title: ADK-304: High-Throughput Message Queues for Agents
author: Google Cloud
description: Scale A2A traffic with asynchronous message brokers like RabbitMQ or Kafka, implementing retry policies and DLQs.

features.title: Asynchronous Brokers
features.description: Offload agent messages to RabbitMQ, decoupling synchronous execution threads.

features.title: Retry Policies
features.description: Design delivery retry protocols and exponential backoff loops for failed agent calls.

features.title: Dead Letter Queues
features.description: Redirect unresolvable agent transaction payloads to DLQs for developer audit analysis.
